items.briefing:
Australian SMEs are increasingly adopting AI tools but many are doing so without updating workflows or proper governance, raising concerns about "shadow AI" — staff using unauthorised AI applications that organisations may not be aware of. This can create data privacy and security risks if sensitive information is entered into unvetted tools.

On the fraud front, Smartcomply has joined Mastercard's Engage program, bringing enhanced fraud detection capabilities to the Australian market. If your organisation uses AI tools, ensure staff only use approved applications and know what data is safe to share.

**Tip:** Ask your team which AI tools they're currently using — you may be surprised.

featured.title: Avoiding shadow AI requires strong enterprise governance
featured.quote: Australian firms risk data breaches and compliance failures through unmanaged AI use in the workplace.
